body.title: Layer 3 brick: OBSERVE engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed OBSERVE as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Compares expected vs actual result, emits delta and observation_confidence to basket. Triggers REPLAN when delta is significant. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
